account.success: Your account has been updated successfully.

delete.success: Your account has been deleted successfully.

password.success: Your password has been updated successfully.

profile.success: Your profile has been updated successfully.

email_change.success: Your email address has been changed successfully.
email_change.no_pending: You don't have any pending email change.

notification.subject: Your email address is being changed
notification.intro: This email is to notify you that your account email address is being changed from {old} to {new}.
notification.warning: If you did not initiate this change, your account may be compromised. Please contact our support team immediately.
notification.action: If you need assistance, please contact us at:

confirm.subject: Confirm your email address change
confirm.intro: You have requested to change your email address to {email}. Please confirm this change by clicking the button below.
confirm.outro: If you did not request this change, please ignore this email.
confirm.expiry: This confirmation link will expire in {hours} hour.
confirm.footer: If you're having trouble clicking the button, copy and paste the URL below into your web browser:
